race.comment: EYES TO ME (7) clearly went amiss but his two runs prior to kick off the prep were good when finding the line strongly. Watch for him running on late. ALEKHINE'S GUN (11) progressed nicely last time when battling on gamely into second at Balaklava. Yet to be tested at this trip but strips fitter and deserves a lot more respect this time. PIANTA (5) was a determined winner two back then raced on the speed last time before finishing second over 2000m at Casterton. Backs up quickly and only needs to hold his form to be right there again. The 120-start veteran SMILING ASSASSIN (3) has been in the placings at his last two starts and should be hitting his straps now over a preferred trip. The old boy gets his chance. THREE REEL ROSES (8) ran a better race to finish fourth last time out over this trip at Bendigo after being in the firing line on the corner. No tougher this time and gets a key booking in Milnes. One to consider.
